title: YouTube Integration?
excerpt: We are content creators and we’d like a way to bring YouTube data into our Monday.com instance. We are also app developer :smile:! We wanted to see if there were fellow creators on the Monday platform that have interest …

posts.author: ab5567 (Alex Britton)
posts.cookedHtml: We are content creators and we’d like a way to bring YouTube data into our Monday.com instance. We are also app developer ! We wanted to see if there were fellow creators on the Monday platform that have interest in a marketplace app where we could bring all of your YouTube data into the Monday ecosystem…before we potentially build it!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ab5567 ,

We are Certified Monday & Integromat (Make) Expert/Partner .We can easily integrate Monday and Youtube using Make.

With our expertise and the capabilities , we can definitely help you achieve this seamlessly.

Our solution not only allows you to save all your YouTube data directly into Monday.com but also offers automation features to streamline your processes efficiently.

To give you a glimpse of what’s possible, here are two video URLs demonstrating YouTube automation:

Video 1: Upload Bulk Videos to YouTube Channels

Video 2: How to Auto reply to YouTube comments

See the tutorial of some Monday automations we did here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7a9gULpu7pZ3OAwhxP_8i_zXia9nI-o-

See our blog here on Monday Automations:

https://www.msquare.pro/blog/categories/monday-com

Feel free to check out these videos for a better understanding of how our solution can benefit your content creation workflow. We’re eager to collaborate with you and explore the possibilities further!
